title: 2-Pack Luxury White Faux Silk Rose Garland | 45 Heads Realistic Floral Vine for Wedding Arch Decor, Mantel & Event Backdrops | Elegant Artificial Flower Arrangement (2.4m Length)
seller_info_text: Huangmei County Zhefu Trading Co., Ltd
features: ELEGANT REALISM - Featuring 45 meticulously crafted white roses per garland with vibrant green leaves, our artificial flower vine delivers a natural, fresh appearance year-round without any maintenance or watering required.

VERSATILE DECOR - Transform any space effortlessly; perfect for wedding arches, party backdrops, home entrance decor, staircase railings, mirror frames, and cafe or shop window displays to create a romantic, inviting atmosphere.

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Crafted from premium silk flowers and flexible plastic stems without internal wires, this garland maintains its colour and shape even with prolonged use, offering better value than fresh flowers that wilt quickly.

PREMIUM MATERIALS - Each rose measures approximately 4cm in diameter with clear vein detailing on leaves, made from high-quality silk fabric and sturdy plastic that can be easily bent or trimmed to fit your specific decoration needs.

COMPLETE PACKAGE - Receive two full garlands, each measuring 250cm in length, providing ample coverage for large-scale decorations; easily combine multiple strands for a lush, professional-looking display.
description: Create Enchanting Spaces with Our White Rose Garland Transform your ordinary spaces into extraordinary settings with our beautifully crafted artificial rose garland. Whether you're planning a dream wedding, hosting a special party, or simply refreshing your home decor, this versatile floral vine offers the perfect solution. Product Features: Two premium white rose garlands, each 250cm long 45 delicate rose blooms per garland with natural green foliage High-quality silk flowers with flexible plastic stems Fade-resistant colours that maintain their vibrant appearance Easy to bend, shape, and trim to fit any space No watering or maintenance required Perfect For: Wedding ceremonies and receptions Birthday parties and special celebrations Home decoration throughout the year Cafe, restaurant, and retail displays Photo shoots and event backdrops DIY craft projects and gift wrapping Easy Installation: Simply unwind the garlands, adjust the flowers and leaves to your preferred arrangement, and hang using the flexible stems. The garlands can be draped, wrapped, or secured with clear hooks or tape for temporary displays. Package Includes: 2 x White Artificial Rose Garlands (250cm each) Care Instructions: Gently dust with a soft cloth or use a hairdryer on cool setting to maintain freshness. Store in a dry place when not in use. Add a touch of eternal elegance to your next celebration with our reusable white rose garland collection.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Dust Resistant, Eco-Friendly, Lightweight, Water Resistant, Weather Resistant
